system.description:
This spell creates the illusion of an object, creature or force, as visualized by the caster. Sound, smell and thermal illusions may be all included in the spell effect. Creatures who view the illusion believe it, and can suffer damage from illusions. Hit point damage is suffered from damage to the mind/psyche. The illusion activates when a specific condition occurs, chosen when the spell is cast. The trigger can be based upon any condition normally obvious to the senses. The illusion follows a script determined by the caster without requiring the caster's concentration, and can include intelligible speech if the caster wishes. The image disappears if an opponent makes the saving throw.

The material components for this spell is a 100gp lens.
